description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named update-flake-lock that updates the flake.lock file. The workflow should trigger on manual dispatch, on a monthly schedule, and on push events to the flake.nix file. It should run on an ubuntu-latest job, but only for the Alexays/Waybar repository. The job should check out the repository, install Nix with a GitHub access token, and update the flake.lock file using the update-flake-lock action.
